summary: As a Full Stack Developer at Quadque Technologies Limited, you'll be responsible for designing, developing and maintaining web applications, software, and systems that cover both the front-end and back-end of a project. You'll need to have a strong understanding of various programming languages (PHP/Laravel and  Vue.js / React.js is must), frameworks, and tools required to develop a complete web application. Your responsibilities will include managing databases, server-side scripting, front-end development, testing and debugging, and deploying the final product. As a Full Stack Developer at Quadque Technologies Limited, you'll be expected to work with different technologies and platforms to deliver a seamless user experience while having a good understanding of both the client-side and server-side of web development.
responsibility: Candidates must have Solid experience in Raw PHP, Laravel, Vue.js, React.js, MySQL, JavaScript, HTML and CSS.
Develop back-end programing and logic in PHP(Laravel).
Integration of user-facing elements developed by front-end developers.
Build efficient, testable, and reusable PHP modules.
Solve complex performance problems and architectural challenges.
Integration of data storage solutions.
Help with code reviews and sharing your expertise with other developers.
Fix bugs, troubleshoot, and resolve problems of existing or current projects.
requirements: Strong knowledge of PHP web frameworks.
Understanding the fully synchronous behavior of PHP.
Basic understanding of front-end technologies, such as JavaScript, HTML5, and CSS3.
Knowledge of object-oriented PHP programming.
Strong knowledge of the common PHP or web server exploits and their solutions.
Team working .
Proficient in English (oral & written).
Good troubleshooting skills.
Continuous learner.
Proactive.
Possesses a sense of ownership.
Interest in the work being done.
Must have previous and proven experience.
Job Related Skills Requirements.
Core Php/Laravel Knowledge.
Proven working experience with PHP Laravel framework and Integration with API.
edu_requirement: B.Sc. / M.Sc. in Computer Science, Information System, or related field from any reputed public or private university.
additional: Work with an exciting team and products.
experience_req: 3-6 Years  ## Do not Apply if you are a fresher## ## Do not Apply if you do not have enough time to read or enough understanding of the job responsibilities##

summary: QuadQue Technologies Ltd. is looking for a sharp, talented, and dedicated Senior Visualizer to enhance our client's online presence along with brand value with eye-catching and professional designs. We need someone with extraordinary touch with photoshop and image manipulations. Also advance level of Video/Motion expertise.
responsibility: Analyze the content and ideas appropriate visual representation for the same.
Will be responsible for creating production/design guidelines and standard and ensure those being followed diligently.
Will be responsible for visualizing & designing screens based on approved look & feel and design guidelines standards.
Expert in visualisation and conceptualization.
Expert in Adobe Photoshop, Illustrator and other graphic tools and image manipulations.
Advance video production.
edu_requirement: Graduation from Fine Arts (preferably from Graphics Design) also skilled candidates from any other discipline are encouraged to apply. ** Freshers are not allowed to apply for this position.
salary: 30,000 BDT - 50,000 BDT (Depending on the skill sets)
additional: Work with an exciting team and products.
experience_req: 4-8 years of industry experience. It can be relaxed for exceptional candidates. ## Do not Apply if you are a fresher##
